summary: Creates a promise for an appropriate source map consumer from either serialized or structured source map input.
signature_intent: Accepts source map data and an optional source map URL/context, then returns a resolved promise containing a consumer for that map.
behavior: Parses serialized source map input before creating a consumer.
Uses an indexed source map consumer when the map contains sections.
Uses a basic source map consumer when the map does not contain sections.
Passes the URL/context through to the created consumer.
Returns a promise that resolves to the created consumer.
edge_cases: String input must be valid source map data accepted by the parser.
Structured input must be compatible with the selected consumer type.
A map with a present sections field is treated as indexed.
Construction or parsing errors surface synchronously before a resolved promise is returned.
forbidden_details: Repository and source path details are intentionally omitted.
Implementation-specific formatting and branching quirks are intentionally omitted.
